Home.name: Cuong (Henry) Nguyen
Home.tagline: AI Engineer · Vibration-Based Fault Diagnosis & Edge AI
Home.bio: Mechatronics graduate from Hanoi University of Science and Technology, focused on building AI systems that diagnose mechanical faults from vibration signals — from signal preprocessing and transformer models all the way to deploying them on edge devices for real-time inference. Outside of research, I build small AI-powered indie projects in my spare time.

About.title: About
About.intro: I'm Cuong, a Mechatronics engineer (Good Graduation) from Hanoi University of Science and Technology. I work at the intersection of signal processing, machine learning, and embedded systems — turning raw vibration data into reliable, real-time diagnostics for rotating machinery.

items.backend: Fault diagnosis & PHM — vibration analysis, RUL prediction, explainable AI for rotating machinery.
items.indie: Edge AI — deploying classical and deep models (Softmax Regression, Random Forest, Transformers) on edge hardware for standalone real-time inference.
items.writing: Indie AI projects — e.g. AutoDub-Lite, an end-to-end pipeline that dubs English YouTube videos into Vietnamese using STT, MT and TTS.
